summary: Tested Mira OS 'Concierge®' branding and dynamic quick actions feature on /celebrate-new page. All 8 features tested and PASSED. The Chat tab has been successfully renamed to 'Concierge®' with the registered trademark symbol (®), using a MessageSquare (chat bubble) icon. Dynamic quick actions at the bottom change based on pet selection - when Lola is selected, actions show 'Help me with Lola', 'Lola's birthday', 'Food for Lola'. When no pet selected, actions show 'Get started', 'Celebrate', 'Shop'. Input placeholder is personalized: 'Ask about Lola...' when pet is selected.
critical_code_review_comments: Line 657: Tab label correctly shows 'Concierge®' with MessageSquare icon
Line 724: Empty state heading uses <sup> for ® symbol: Concierge<sup>®</sup>
Lines 814-861: Dynamic quick actions implementation correctly handles pet-selected vs no-pet scenarios
Line 828: When pet selected shows 'Help me with {petName}', when no pet shows 'Get started'
Line 876: Input placeholder uses selectedPet?.name for personalization
seed_data_creation: None - used existing user with pets (Lola, Mystique, Bruno, Luna, Buddy)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira OS Concierge® branding is fully functional on /celebrate-new. Key data-testids: mira-os-modal, mira-os-tab-chat, mira-os-chat-input. The modal opens via 'Mira OS' BETA button in bottom left corner. Pet switcher appears at top of modal when logged in. Quick actions at bottom are dynamic based on pet selection.

features_tested.concierge_tab_has_chat_icon: PASS - MessageSquare icon (Freshchat-style chat bubble) at line 657
features_tested.empty_state_shows_concierge_heading: PASS - Shows 'Concierge®' with superscript ® at line 724
features_tested.dynamic_quick_actions_no_pet: PASS - Shows 'Get started', 'Celebrate', 'Shop' when no pet (lines 846-859)
features_tested.dynamic_quick_actions_with_pet: PASS - Shows 'Help me with Lola', 'Lola's birthday', 'Food for Lola' (lines 827-845)
features_tested.input_placeholder_with_pet: PASS - Shows 'Ask about Lola...' at line 876
features_tested.input_placeholder_no_pet: PASS - Shows 'Ask your Concierge...' at line 876
features_tested.chat_flow_integration: PASS - Messages sent and AI responses received with personalized recommendations
